policies.title: License policies
policies.subtitle: Override how SPDX licenses map to allowed, conditional, and forbidden for your team or organization.
policies.empty: No license policies yet. Pick a team above to author one.

enabled.label: Policy enabled
enabled.help: When off, the team falls back to the static built-in license catalog without losing this policy's contents.

unknown.label: Uncatalogued license posture
unknown.help: Category applied to a license that is in neither the built-in catalog nor the overrides below.

compound.label: Compound expression strategy
compound.help: How a multi-license expression (A AND B, A OR B, A WITH exception) is resolved into one category.

overrides.title: Category overrides
overrides.help: Force a specific SPDX license identifier into a category, replacing the catalog verdict.
overrides.empty: No overrides. The built-in catalog decides every license.

exceptions.title: License exceptions
exceptions.help: Explicit waivers — each forces the matched license to allowed, optionally until an expiry date or for one component.
exceptions.reason_placeholder: Why this license is waived (e.g. legal-approved waiver TICKET-123).

editor.description: Changes apply to the build-blocking gate the next time the team is evaluated.
editor.no_policy_hint: This scope has no policy yet. Configure it below and save to create one.
editor.readonly_member: You can view this policy but only a team admin can change it.
editor.readonly_role: You do not have permission to edit this policy.

toast.reset: Policy reset. The team now falls back to the org default or the static catalog.

errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.not_found: No policy was found for this scope.
errors.conflict: A policy already exists for this scope. Reload and try again.
errors.validation: The policy could not be saved. Check the identifiers, sizes, and reasons, then try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
